name: G6 — specialty-domain template (replace with YOUR subject matter)
system_prompt: TODO: domain-specific instruction. Example: 'Answer using ONLY the regulatory text. Cite the section number for each claim. If the text doesn't address the question, say so.'
context: TODO: paste 1–3 paragraphs of authoritative text from your actual subject matter (medical guideline / legal regulation / engineering spec / etc.). Keep it under ~500 words for a 2B context budget.
question: TODO: a question whose correct answer requires reasoning across the provided text — not memorization.
scoring_note: TODO: write a one-line note about what the gold answer looks like and what failure mode this fixture catches in your domain.
